metadata.description: Claude Code plugins featuring skills, slash commands, autonomous subagents, hooks, and MCP server integrations for Git workflow, code review, and plugin development.

plugins.name: intelligent-compact
plugins.description: PreCompact hook that injects a priority list so conversation summaries preserve unanswered questions, root causes, file paths, metrics, IDs, and subagent findings.

plugins.name: claude-telemetry-hooks
plugins.description: Hooks that enrich Claude Code OTel telemetry: sticky chat_id across resumed sessions, and categorized reject-reason feedback events.

plugins.name: anthropic-office-skills
plugins.description: Official Anthropic skills for PDF, Word, PowerPoint, and Excel document processing.

plugins.name: openai-office-skills
plugins.description: Official OpenAI skills for PDF, Word, PowerPoint, and Excel document processing.

plugins.name: python-skills
plugins.description: Python best practices grounded in PEP 8, PEP 20 (Zen of Python), Google Python Style Guide, and Effective Python by Brett Slatkin.

plugins.name: react-skills
plugins.description: React, Next.js, and React Native best practices with web design guidelines.

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, take screenshots, and test web apps.

plugins.name: frontend-design-skills
plugins.description: Frontend design skills from Anthropic and OpenAI for building visually strong landing pages, websites, and apps.

plugins.name: mongodb-skills
plugins.description: Official MongoDB agent skills for schema design, query tuning, search, and connections.

plugins.name: supabase-skills
plugins.description: Supabase skills for Postgres best practices, JavaScript SDK (auth, database, storage, realtime), and CLI (migrations, edge functions, local dev).

plugins.name: stripe-skills
plugins.description: Official Stripe payment platform skills for checkout, billing, Connect, and API upgrades.

plugins.name: polar-skills
plugins.description: Official Polar payment processor skills for billing, subscriptions, and local development.

plugins.name: livekit-skills
plugins.description: LiveKit Agents SDK skills for building voice AI agents with CLI-based workflow, supporting both Cloud and self-hosted deployments.

plugins.name: cloudflare-skills
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare developer platform skill for Workers, Durable Objects, R2, D1, KV, AI, and 50+ services.

plugins.name: web-performance-skills
plugins.description: Web performance auditing skill for Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, render-blocking resources, and accessibility.

plugins.name: openobserve-skills
plugins.description: OpenObserve REST API skill for AI agents. Search logs/metrics/traces, manage streams, and create/edit/inspect dashboards via curl.

plugins.name: hetzner-skills
plugins.description: Hetzner Cloud CLI skill for servers, networks, firewalls, load balancers, DNS, volumes, and storage.

plugins.name: dokploy-skills
plugins.description: Dokploy deployment skill for Dokploy Cloud, self-hosted dashboard, Docker Compose, databases, domains, remote servers, and Dokploy CLI workflows.

plugins.name: anthropic-essentials
plugins.description: Feature development with code-architect/explorer/reviewer agents, CLAUDE.md audit and session learnings, and Agent Skills creation with eval benchmarking from Anthropic.

hooks.prompt: Check if this turn made significant code changes (new features, architecture changes, discovered gotchas). If so, briefly suggest the user run /revise-claude-md to capture learnings in CLAUDE.md. Only suggest if meaningful patterns were discovered. Do not suggest for trivial changes, and do not repeat if already suggested this session.
This session is ending. If significant codebase changes were made and CLAUDE.md was not updated, remind the user to run /revise-claude-md in their next session to capture learnings.

plugins.name: anthropic-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for hooks, MCP servers, slash commands, subagents, skill creation, and plugin structure from Anthropic.

plugins.name: phd-skills
plugins.description: Research skills for Claude Code — paper auditing, citation verification, experiment analysis, and methodology-first skills for academic workflows.

plugins.name: github-dev
plugins.description: GitHub and Git workflow skills and agents for commits, PRs, code review, and PR comment resolution.

plugins.name: ultralytics-dev
plugins.description: Auto-formatting hooks for Python, JavaScript, Markdown, and Bash with Google-style docstrings and code quality checks.

plugins.name: azure-tools
plugins.description: Azure MCP Server integration for 40+ Azure services with Azure CLI authentication.

plugins.name: claude-tools
plugins.description: Commands for syncing CLAUDE.md, permissions allowlist, and refreshing context. Hooks for marketplace-to-plugin sync.

plugins.name: gcloud-tools
plugins.description: Google Cloud Observability MCP for logs, metrics, and traces with best practices skill.

plugins.name: paper-search-tools
plugins.description: Academic paper search MCP for arXiv, PubMed, IEEE, Scopus, ACM, and more. Requires Docker.

plugins.name: tavily-tools
plugins.description: Tavily web search and content extraction MCP with hooks and skills for optimal tool selection.
